codeReview.summary: The fix commit adequately addresses the prior 5xx Pending-branch failure by implementing approach B: setup-layer result handling is centralized in `_on_verify_result`, `AuthServerError` and `AuthUnreachable` are explicitly funneled into the same Pending-unreachable branch, and new regressions verify identical Pending UX for 5xx and network-drop inputs plus retry recovery to Verified. Comparing the original failed feature diff (b906b60) and this fix diff (d721ecd) shows the missing explicitness and coverage were added without broad scope expansion.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission contract text still describes VAL-FLOW-038 as uploader-level classification (`probe_credentials` returns `AuthUnreachable` for sentiments.cc 5xx), while the accepted fix path implemented setup-layer equivalence (approach B) and intentionally leaves uploader classification as `AuthServerError`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:1412-1414 states 5xx "must classify" as AuthUnreachable in Uploader.probe_credentials; client/cc_sentiment/upload.py:190-193 still returns AuthServerError for non-401/403 HTTPStatusError; client/cc_sentiment/tui/screens/setup.py:597 maps `AuthUnreachable() | AuthServerError()` to the same Pending-unreachable branch.

summary: Reviewed the fix session transcript skeleton, handoff, prior failed review, and both relevant diffs (b906b60 and d721ecdf9463bcb809d59e74be84c54a6a1e5b35). The fix is sufficient for the scoped failure: 5xx and network-drop now have explicitly unified Pending handling in setup with regression coverage, so this review passes.
